contract_summary: 12-month annual SaaS subscription for 150 seats at $12,500/month ($150,000/yr), billed annually in advance. A $40,000 one-time onboarding and data migration fee performed by Acme. A 120-hour Advanced Implementation engagement at $250/hour ($30,000), optional, delivered by Acme's professional services team against a separate SOW. Premium 24x7 support is included at no additional charge. Payment terms net-30. Service start date 2026-03-01, contract executed 2026-02-15. Auto-renews for successive 12-month terms at list price unless either party gives 60 days' notice. Customer may cancel unused Advanced Implementation hours with 30 days' notice for a pro-rata refund. No significant financing component — fees are annual prepaid, not multi-year.
